steps.title: In FIJI, create new image stacks...
steps.instruction: In FIJI, create new image stacks from two rectangular selections: one containing a section of the membrane tube, and one containing the approximately horizontal section of the guv.

steps.title: Save these new stacks as
steps.instruction: Save these new stacks as .tif files and paste paths into enrichment quantification script.

steps.title: Run enrichment quantification, adjusting parameters such...
steps.instruction: Run enrichment quantification, adjusting parameters such as ktub to fit your experimental conditions.
